ogTitle: Derrinallum vs Devils River: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Derrinallum and Devils River.
heading: Derrinallum vs Devils River — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Derrinallum, Victoria and Devils River, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Devils River has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Derrinallum (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Derrinallum or Devils River safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Derrinallum has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Devils River scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Derrinallum scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Devils River scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Derrinallum or Devils River?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Devils River has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
